cleavage agent: 20 μL of a 1:5 dilution of stock trypsin (1 μg/μL; Promega) was added
enrichment method: we performed affinity purification in the evolved ulp2Δ strains
instrument: identified SUMO-modified proteins using a Q-Exactive plus spectrometer
labeling: we suggest that Ubc9 auto-sumoylation regulates both transcriptional and post-translational targets of the SUMO pathway
reduction reagent: reduced with DTT and alkylated with MMTS
